basics.name: Lianghui Yi
basics.label: Forward Deployed Engineer
basics.summary: Forward Deployed Engineer with 5+ years shipping AI-powered products and infrastructure at scale. Specialized in autonomous agent development, LLM integration, and multi-tenant cloud systems deployed directly with enterprise customers. Proven expertise building production agentic systems, designing evaluation frameworks, and accelerating deployment cycles through CI/CD automation and customer-centric engineering.

work.name: 24 Helpful, LLC
highlights: Designed and shipped a self-evolving code system with generator/evaluator loops that accelerated development velocity; implemented CI/CD automation with GitHub Actions to close iteration cycles in under 24 hours—directly applicable to agentic system evaluation and autonomous code generation.

Delivered end-to-end multi-tenant AWS cloud infrastructure for enterprise customers, reducing provisioning costs by 50% through automated resource management, tenant isolation, and production-grade deployment patterns.

Collaborated directly with enterprise customers to scope technical requirements, remove deployment blockers, and accelerate rollouts; codified deployment playbooks and runbooks to standardize operational response across production systems.

work.name: 24Haowan Network Technology Co., Ltd.
highlights: Designed a SaaS product and go-to-market strategy that achieved $1,000,000 ARR in 2 years through data-driven iteration loops, customer discovery, and rapid experimentation—core competencies for forward deployment.

Led cross-functional engineering team; built internal tools and infrastructure that streamlined product and engineering workflows, improving team delivery cadence and enabling faster customer feedback cycles.

Engaged directly with enterprise customers to scope technical requirements and uncover pain points, converting 3 strategic accounts within 3 months and driving product-market fit through customer-centric engineering.

work.name: Maiduote Network Technology Co., Ltd.
highlights: Led end-to-end product development and launched a production platform that increased doctor-patient engagement by 30%; integrated predefined forms and chatbots in collaboration with stakeholders—demonstrating full-stack deployment expertise.
Scoped and delivered data-driven features across the full stack, coordinating cross-functional teams to prioritize roadmap items and ensure stable, rapid rollouts to production systems.
Drove customer-facing growth strategies that acquired over 50,000 users in 6 months, exceeding targets through targeted outreach and workflow optimization.

projects.name: aInbox (ainbox.io)
highlights: Built an MCP-native AI agent middleware platform giving LLMs a dedicated inbox and async messaging layer, operated entirely via Model Context Protocol tools—directly aligned with OpenAI's MCP ecosystem and agentic system design.

Designed full server architecture with OAuth, JWT, and Streamable HTTP transport; implemented LLM-driven triage and labeling pipeline deployed on multi-tenant AWS infrastructure using Aurora Serverless, SES, and per-user IAM roles for enterprise-grade security and scalability.

projects.name: tokenman.io
projects.description: Claude Code Hosting & AI Repo Self-Evolution
highlights: Built terminal.tokenman.io—a multi-tenant Claude Code CLI hosting SaaS on EC2 with mobile-first SSH, persistent tmux sessions, and cloud-init provisioning for secure production access and autonomous agent deployment.

Designed a skill-based repo self-evolution system with shared AI context and slash commands, enabling autonomous AI-driven code loops via GitHub Actions with human + AI and headless generator/evaluator workflows—core agentic evaluation patterns.

projects.name: AgentFolio
highlights: Built an agentic portfolio engine that detects visitor context and dynamically adapts resume content using LLM-powered rewriting and JD-matching pipelines; deployed on pure GitHub infrastructure with zero third-party cost.

Designed a five-stage agent architecture (perceive → reason → act → learn → explain) with RAG-powered chat, automated JD fetching, and visitor feedback loops that continuously optimize content resonance—demonstrating end-to-end agentic system design.

volunteer.summary: Led community initiatives and organized weekly founder-focused events (1,000+ participants in one year), coordinated volunteers and facilitated connections to strengthen engagement and collaboration.
